Short CV

She completed her B.Sc. in Computer Engineering (English) in 2020 at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences. Her undergraduate thesis focused on Gender Classification Based on Emotional EEG Data.

During her bachelor’s studies, she also earned an associate degree in Web Design and Coding.

After graduation, she completed an associate degree in Human Resources Management at Anadolu University and obtained a Master’s degree in Business Administration from Istanbul University.

She also earned her M.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence Engineering (with Thesis) at Üsküdar University.

In 2021, she began working at Üsküdar University as a Distance Education Assistant Specialist, and since 2022, she has been serving as a research assistant in the Computer Engineering (English) Department.

She is currently pursuing a Ph.D. in Computer Engineering at Marmara University.
